key_findings.message: GITHUB_TOKEN reaches 5 sinks via authority propagation: [actions/checkout@v6, pnpm/action-setup@v4, actions/setup-node@v6, vale-cli/vale-action@v2.1.1, cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3]
CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID propagated to cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3 across trust boundary
CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_API_TOKEN propagated to cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3 across trust boundary
Step '➕ Add `bin` to GITHUB_PATH' writes to the environment gate while holding authority (GITHUB_TOKEN) — secrets may leak into pipeline environment
Earlier step '➕ Add `bin` to GITHUB_PATH' mutates GITHUB_PATH before '🚀 Deploy Docs website' runs npx/wrangler via PATH and passes sensitive authority through stdin
Earlier step '➕ Add `bin` to GITHUB_PATH' mutates GITHUB_PATH before '🚀 Deploy Docs website' runs npx/wrangler via PATH and passes sensitive authority through environment variables
Earlier step '➕ Add `bin` to GITHUB_PATH' mutates GITHUB_PATH before later action '🚀 Deploy Docs website' materializes authority and resolves helper `npx/wrangler` through PATH
Earlier step '➕ Add `bin` to GITHUB_PATH' mutates GITHUB_PATH before '🚀 Deploy Docs website' resolves security-sensitive helper `npx/wrangler` by name
